booking.termsText: I have read and accept the
booking.termsError: You must accept the terms to continue.
booking.termsBooking: The booking is confirmed once the hotel responds via WhatsApp or email.
booking.termsCheckin: Check-in and check-out at 12:00. Early check-in from 5:00 AM if available, no extra charge. Late check-out until 20:00 for 50 Bs/person.
booking.termsCancel: In case of no-show or late cancellation, the first night may be charged.
booking.termsPets: All pets welcome. Fee of $3 USD/night.
booking.termsSmoking: Smoking is permitted on the terrace only.
booking.termsTerrace: Open to all guests — work, relax or bring your own food.
booking.termsLaundry: Service available, price based on total weight.
booking.termsPayment: Payment is made at check-in. The hotel may request a security deposit.
booking.formError: Please fill in all required fields.
booking.successMsg1: We received your booking request for the
booking.successMsg2: We'll confirm as soon as possible via WhatsApp or email.
booking.successFallbackWa: If WhatsApp didn't open automatically, write to us at
booking.successFallbackEmail: If your email client didn't open, write to us at
booking.msgTerms: Guest accepted the terms and conditions.
booking.emailCopyInstructions: Copy the message below and send it by email to
booking.tms1p: By virtue of this contract, Mauricio Davalos, owner of Bastille Hotel (NIT 750303601), located at Aniceto Arce 247, between Av. Hernando Siles and Urcullo St., Sucre, Bolivia, hereinafter "THE HOTEL", shall provide accommodation services to the GUEST in the assigned room in exchange for a price, for the number of nights confirmed in the booking.
booking.tms1a: The assigned room may be changed for one of equal conditions in case of force majeure.
booking.tms1b: from 12:00. Early check-in from 5:00 AM is available at no extra charge if the room is ready.
booking.tms1c: until 12:00. Late check-out until 20:00 has a charge of 50 Bs per person.
booking.tms1d: Partial use of the stay entails payment of the full rate.
booking.tms2a: The price corresponds to the rate per night in USD as per the booking confirmation.
booking.tms2b: Payment is made at check-in. Cash in USD or bolivianos (Bs) at the current exchange rate is accepted.
booking.tms2c: The GUEST shall pay all additional charges generated during their stay (laundry, etc.).
booking.tms2d: The pet fee is $3 USD per night, payable at check-in.
booking.tms3p: Valuables (jewelry, cash, electronic equipment, documents) left in the room or common areas are entirely at the GUEST's risk. THE HOTEL assumes no responsibility for loss or damage to such items.
booking.tms4h1: Provide accommodation services in adequate conditions of hygiene, safety and comfort.
booking.tms4h2: Handle and respond to GUEST suggestions, complaints or claims.
booking.tms4h3: Comply with the provisions of the Bolivian General Tourism Law (Law No. 292 of 2012) and applicable regulations.
booking.tms4g1: Identify themselves at registration with a valid ID document (national ID for Bolivians, passport for foreigners).
booking.tms4g2: Pay for accommodation and all additional services consumed.
booking.tms4g3: Register all companions at the hotel front desk.
booking.tms4g4: Respect the maximum number of persons allowed per room.
booking.tms4g5: Use hotel furniture and equipment properly, being liable for any damage caused.
booking.tms4g6: Respect the hotel's internal regulations and coexistence norms.
booking.tms5pets: Pet-friendly hotel. All pets accepted with an additional charge of $3 USD/night. The GUEST is responsible for their pet's behavior and any damage caused.
booking.tms5smoke: The hotel is smoke-free indoors. Smoking is only allowed on the terrace. Smoking in rooms constitutes a serious breach of contract and may result in additional cleaning charges.
booking.tms5terrace: Open to all guests — work, relax or bring your own food.
booking.tms5laundry: Service available with an additional charge based on total weight.
booking.tms5visits: Visitors are received in the hotel's social and common areas. Additional persons entering the room must be reported at reception.
booking.tms5minors: THE HOTEL will not provide accommodation to minors without a parent or duly authorized legal guardian.
booking.tms6b: THE HOTEL may charge the equivalent of the first night.
booking.tms6c: Guests who have checked in and wish to end their stay early are not entitled to a refund for unused nights.
booking.tms7p: The contract terminates upon expiry of the agreed period, breach of GUEST obligations, behavior that threatens the peace or safety of other guests, or violation of internal regulations. Termination does not exempt the GUEST from payment of outstanding balances.
booking.tms8p: By confirming the booking, the GUEST authorizes Mauricio Davalos / Bastille Hotel (NIT 750303601) to collect, store and use personal data provided (name, ID, nationality, email, phone) for: accommodation service management, booking communications, post-stay satisfaction surveys, and hotel offers (with prior consent). Data will not be shared with third parties without the GUEST's consent, except as required by law. The GUEST may request access, correction or deletion of their data by contacting the hotel.
booking.tms9a: This contract is governed by the laws of the Republic of Bolivia, particularly the General Tourism Law (Law No. 292 of 2012) and the Bolivian Civil Code.
booking.tms9b: For any dispute, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of the city of Sucre, Bolivia.
booking.tms9c: THE HOTEL rejects and prohibits any form of discrimination based on gender, race, ethnic origin, religion or sexual orientation.
booking.tms9d: THE HOTEL rejects and prohibits any form of sexual exploitation or abuse, especially of minors, in accordance with the Bolivian Penal Code.
